title: Silly Sodas
description: A variety of sodas, and other drinks some with special ability others just simple rid your thirst
body:
# 🥤 Silly Sodas

**Thirsty? Don't be.**

**Silly Sodas** adds a refreshing (and slightly chaotic) twist to your game. We believe that hydration shouldn't just be about survival—it should be an *experience*. Whether you need a quick sugar rush to outrun a creeper or just want to crack open a cold one with the boys after a mining trip, we've got the fizz for you.

Some drinks are just tasty treats to top off your thirst bar. Others? Well, let’s just say they have... *side effects*. Drink responsibly.

---

## 🧃 Current Soda Menu

Here is our current lineup of legally-distinct beverages found in loot chests or crafted in your kitchen:

### **Dr. Checker**

### **Popsie**

### **Energy Drink**
- Gives you a short energy boost but not without a crash

### **Sprisck**

### **Mount Doom**

### **BocaBola**

### **Rootbeer Float**
- Makes you float

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

> **Please Note:** All soda names, brands, and logos featured in this mod are purely works of parody and fiction. Any resemblance to actual multi-billion dollar soda corporations is entirely coincidental and definitely not grounds for a lawsuit. We changed the names so we don't get sued. Please don't sue us. We have no money, only a tiny bit of sanity and computer.

> Everything is still a work in progress so alot of things are still unavalible such as crafting, drink effects, ect. me and my team will be working on getting updates out and creating new features, let us know using the links bellow what you want to see in this mod!

---

## 🚧 Coming Soon

We are hard at work brewing up the next batch! Here is what you can expect in future updates:

* **Mount Doom:** A neon-green radioactive sludge that makes you glow in the dark.
* **Fan-tasm:** An orange soda that turns you invisible (ghost soda!).
* **Root Beer Float:** Literally a mug of root beer that makes you **Levitate**.
* **Effects:** Adds the **Effects** to the sodas as stated in the abouts.

---

## 💡 Have a Soda Idea?

We want to fill the fridge with **YOUR** favorite drinks! If you have an idea for a new soda (and a silly parody name for it), please:

1.  **Leave a comment** on this project page.
2.  **Join our Discord** [Join here](https://discord.gg/67FH3ZSM8t) to suggest textures and effects.
